response.overview: Armen lived a life shadowed by deep emotional wounds until he met Fadhil, a friend who offered comfort through meaningful conversations about pain and resilience. However, this solace began to fracture when those around Armen started questioning Fadhil’s existence, blurring the line between reality and the projection of his overwhelming loneliness. As the truth began to unfold, Armen was forced to confront the trauma he had long suppressed, realizing that true healing only begins with the courage to accept reality and seek real support.
response.tagline: Healing unseen wounds, accepting unspoken realities.
response.title: Others
